title: Monet DB giving wrong value from a table when a value is queried after insertion/ Data Loss
poc: CREATE TABLE testtable (dim_id bigint DEFAULT NEXT VALUE FOR "testtable_seq", dim_type varchar(100) NOT NULL, dim_value varchar(100) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT unique_dimension UNIQUE(dim_type,dim_value) , CONSTRAINT pk_testtable PRIMARY KEY (dim_id));

CREATE TABLE test(roe_id bigint DEFAULT NEXT VALUE FOR "test_seq", roe_type bigint NOT NULL, node_event_id bigint NOT NULL, dc_servername varchar(50), roe_start_date_withtz varchar(50) , usr_id bigint, customgroup_id bigint, queuename_id bigint, exitstatus_id bigint);
select dim_id,dim_type,dim_value from testtable where dim_type='user' and dim_value='user1';
select roe_id ,count(*) from test group by roe_id having count(*) > 1;
select min(roe_id), max(roe_id), count(*), count(roe_id), count(distinct roe_id) from test;
key_bug_features: Incorrect value retrieval after data insertion
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE testtable (dim_id bigint DEFAULT NEXT VALUE FOR "testtable_seq", dim_type varchar(100) NOT NULL, dim_value varchar(100) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT unique_dimension UNIQUE(dim_type,dim_value), CONSTRAINT pk_testtable PRIMARY KEY (dim_id));
SELECT dim_id, dim_type, dim_value FROM testtable WHERE dim_type='user' AND dim_value='user1';

CREATE TABLE test (roe_id bigint DEFAULT NEXT VALUE FOR "test_seq", roe_type bigint NOT NULL, node_event_id bigint NOT NULL, dc_servername varchar(50), roe_start_date_withtz varchar(50), usr_id bigint, customgroup_id bigint, queuename_id bigint, exitstatus_id bigint);
INSERT INTO test (roe_type, node_event_id, dc_servername) VALUES (1, 100, 'server1');
